str_content:
CASE REFERENCE
STR-2026-06-01-1681

REPORTING ENTITY
MuleShield AI, AML Compliance Division

SUBJECT ACCOUNTS
The following accounts have been identified as suspicious:
- ACC05200000000013, Nitin Sinha, suspicious total: ₹492,575.38
- ACC05200000000011, Asha Bhosle, suspicious total: ₹770,701.22 (in and out)
- ACC05200000000007, Hema Malhotra, suspicious total: ₹148,597.16 (in)
- ACC05200000000029, Usha Naik, suspicious total: ₹162,836.72 (in)
- ACC05200000000016, Ramesh Kumar, suspicious total: ₹155,267.34 (in)

FRAUD PATTERN IDENTIFIED
A dormant account reactivation pattern has been identified, where a large transaction is made from a previously inactive account (ACC05200000000013, Nitin Sinha) to an account (ACC05200000000011, Asha Bhosle) that then makes multiple rapid transfers to other accounts, possibly indicating automated mule behaviour.

TRANSACTION TIMELINE
• 2026-05-29 20:00:00: ₹492,575.38 transferred from ACC05200000000013 (Nitin Sinha) to ACC05200000000011 (Asha Bhosle) via NEFT
• 2026-05-29 20:05:00: ₹148,597.16 transferred from ACC05200000000011 (Asha Bhosle) to ACC05200000000007 (Hema Malhotra) via IMPS
• 2026-05-29 20:08:00: ₹162,836.72 transferred from ACC05200000000011 (Asha Bhosle) to ACC05200000000029 (Usha Naik) via IMPS
• 2026-05-29 20:10:00: ₹155,267.34 transferred from ACC05200000000011 (Asha Bhosle) to ACC05200000000016 (Ramesh Kumar) via IMPS
• 2026-06-28 23:00:00: ₹465,771.33 transferred from ACC05200000000030 (Kishore Patil) to ACC05200000000019 (Radha Krishnan) via NEFT (unrelated to the main pattern but included in the key transactions)

REGULATORY BASIS
This report is filed in accordance with Section 12 of the Prevention of Money Laundering Act, 2002 (PMLA), which requires reporting entities to maintain records and furnish information to the Financial Intelligence Unit - India (FIU-IND). Additionally, this report is in compliance with the Reserve Bank of India's (RBI) Master Circular on Know Your Customer (KYC) and Anti-Money Laundering (AML) standards, which mandates reporting suspicious transactions to the FIU-IND.

RECOMMENDED ACTION
Account Freeze: Immediately freeze the accounts ACC05200000000013, ACC05200000000011, ACC05200000000007, ACC05200000000029, and ACC05200000000016 to prevent further suspicious activity. 
Refer to Enforcement Directorate (ED) for further investigation.

RISK RATING
HIGH - The large transaction from a previously inactive account and the subsequent rapid transfers to other accounts indicate a high risk of money laundering.

INVESTIGATING OFFICER
[To be assigned]

REPORT GENERATED
2026-06-01T17:43:46.589692+00:00
